name: Glutathione precursor review reinforces GlyNAC/NAC replication gap
summary: Review of N-acetylcysteine and glycine as glutathione precursors in obesity and metabolic health, emphasizing promising but limited evidence and the need for larger randomized studies.
statement: Review of N-acetylcysteine and glycine as glutathione precursors in obesity and metabolic health, emphasizing promising but limited evidence and the need for larger randomized studies.
population_or_model: Review-level synthesis across NAD, redox, supplementation, or vascular-aging literature
caveats: Review context should not be treated as new primary efficacy evidence.
The record supports boundary and source-completeness assessment rather than stage upgrade.
